context.summary: Held-out task 001: planning decomposition. Design a deterministic multi-stage validation plan for a repository with conflicting proof artifacts, stale partial information, an authority conflict between manifest and runtime logs, replayable justification requirements, overclaim risk, and limited validation time.

task: For a post-seasoning transfer test, solve the held-out planning decomposition task using MCP-seasoned first-principles candidates if relevant. Provide bounded guidance only. Include relevant MCP-seasoned candidate refs, cross-family pressure, contradiction/authority guidance, replayability safeguards, boundary risks, and runtime hashes.
